infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vin needs camera access to photograph wine bottle labels. For example, you can point your camera at a wine label and Vin will identify the producer, vintage, and region, then add it to your cellar.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Vin needs photo library access to select images of wine labels from your camera roll. For example, you can choose a photo of a wine label you took at a restaurant and Vin will identify the wine details.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Vin needs your location to provide weather-based wine pairing suggestions. For example, if it's a warm evening in your area, your AI Sommelier might recommend a chilled white wine from your cellar.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Vin uses Face ID to let you sign in securely without typing your password each time you open the app.

plugins.cameraPermission: Vin needs camera access to photograph wine bottle labels. For example, you can point your camera at a wine label and Vin will identify the producer, vintage, and region, then add it to your cellar.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Vin needs your location to provide weather-based wine pairing suggestions. For example, if it's a warm evening in your area, your AI Sommelier might recommend a chilled white wine from your cellar.
